column1: // database file for native tribes in EE2X
// CLIMATES:  Set of climates this tribe may appear in (if empty tribe appears in all climates)
// POWERS:  Set of powers this tribe may grant (must be present in TheNativeTribesPowerSet) (if emtpy tribe may grant any power)
// EMPIRE TYPE:  Starting forces empire type for the tribe (Balanced Military Imperial or Economic)
// FORCE COMP:  Starting forces force composition for the tribe (Standard Aggressive or Defensive)
// NEUTRAL RESOURCE MOD:  Modifier applied to required resources to assimilate when the tribe is neutral
// HOSTILE RESOURCE MOD:  Modifier applied to required resources to assimilate when the tribe is hostile
